request_payload.exposure_text: After decades of relying on outdated alliances, it's time we focus on real security. Our tax dollars should go to modernizing our own defenses instead of propping up foreign partners who won't commit to their own safety. Look at how Japan and South Korea are investing in their own missile defense systems - why can't we do the same? We can't afford to be the world's policeman anymore. #NationalSecurityFirst #SelfSufficiency
